preamble: Spontaneous diphthongization of short open-mid vowels in open syllables is a hallmark of several Romance languages.

examples.note: Spontaneous diphthongization of Vulgar Latin short /e/ in stressed open syllables.
The open-mid front vowel [ɛ] develops an [i] on-glide.

sources: Ladefoged, P. (2001). A Course in Phonetics.
Alkire, T., & Rosen, C. (2010). Romance Languages: A Historical Introduction. Cambridge University Press.
